title: Conni and the Cat
original_title: Meine Freundin Conni - Geheimnis um Kater Mau
overview: Conni's adorable but mischievous cat Mau follows her on her kindergarten trip, causing mayhem, confusion and laughs. The children are kept busy hiding Mau from the teachers, tracking down a thief and saving a raccoon in an ancient castle.
